title: Add new question type to Forms: Likert scale grid
excerpt:

posts.author: tamreyes (Tamara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! The question types are very limited yet.

We should be able to create a question type that allows us to set up a grid of questions and answers. It is useful when you want to ask respondents to evaluate multiple items using the same set of response options. I know in Google Forms is known as “multiple choice grid”, but I see that others call them “Likert scale” type of questions.

Rows represent the questions or items that the respondents need to evaluate. Columns represent the multiple-choice answers that respondents can choose from for each row or item.

This will allow for Workforms to be much more advanced and a more suitable option when it comes to creating surveys.
